case_title: DURWIN CHEUNG VS. ALEXANDER VLADIMLROVIC ZAYTSEV

docket_entries.description: AMENDED MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,000.00 FILED BY CHEUNG, DURWIN AS TO DEFENDANT ZAYTSEV, ALEXANDER VLADIMLROVIC

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF JAN-29-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF JAN-29-2018 BY PRO TEM MICHELE MCGILL 506. PLAINTIFF DURWIN CHEUNG IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT ALEXANDER ZAYTSEV IS NOT PRESENT. PLAINTIFF EXHIBIT RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: MICHELE MCGILL; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
SF CONSTRUCTION SERVICES IS NO LONGER DEFENDANT
REQUEST FOR RESET OF TRIAL. FORM (SC-150) USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, DURWIN
STIPULATION FOR HEARING BEFORE PRO TEM COMMISSIONER FILED BY CHEUNG, DURWIN
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO SF CONSTRUCTION SERVICES ON 01/29/18. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, THE JUDGMENT IN THIS ACTION HAS BEEN PAID IN FULL OR OTHERWISE SATISFIED. AS TO DEFENDANT ZAYTSEV, ALEXANDER VLADIMLROVIC
TRIAL RESET TO OCT-30-2017 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF SEP-11-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
TRIAL RESET TO JAN-29-2018 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-30-2017 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF CHEUNG, DURWIN
